final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial photo of a tropical resort hotel pool scene overlooking the ocean.

Style/medium: photorealistic travel photography, resort brochure aesthetic, high saturation editorial
Composition: wide establishing shot from pool deck level, infinity pool edge leading the eye toward horizon, 24mm wide-angle lens
Subject: infinity pool with still water, white lounge chairs with matching umbrellas, tall coconut palms framing the scene
Scene/backdrop: open ocean horizon, tropical blue sky with fluffy cumulus clouds, resort deck flooring
Lighting/mood: bright midday sun, crisp shadows, vacation optimism and escapism
Color palette: saturated turquoise pool water, deep ocean blue, vivid sky blue, crisp white furniture, lush green palm fronds
Materials/textures: smooth water surface, woven rattan or fabric umbrella texture, glossy pool tiles, matte concrete deck
Avoid: muted colors, overcast sky, cluttered composition, watermark, 8K stuffer text
